scripts.build: next build && npm run copy:standalone && npm run clean:build-cache
scripts.copy:standalone: mkdir -p .next/standalone/.next && cp -r .next/static .next/standalone/.next/static && ([ -d public ] && cp -r public .next/standalone/public || true)
scripts.quality: npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm run test:i18n && npm run build && npm run test:e2e
scripts.quality:ci: npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm run test:i18n && npm run build && npm run test:e2e:ci
scripts.quality:ui: npm run typecheck && npm run test:i18n && npm run test:e2e:mobile && npm run test:e2e:localization
scripts.quality:booking: npm run typecheck && npm run test:i18n && npm run test:e2e:booking
scripts.quality:fast: npm run typecheck && npm run test:i18n
scripts.test:e2e:ci: playwright test tests/e2e/catalog.spec.ts tests/e2e/company-page.spec.ts tests/e2e/booking-flow.spec.ts tests/e2e/booking-footer.spec.ts tests/e2e/layout-overflow.spec.ts tests/e2e/accessibility.spec.ts tests/e2e/links.spec.ts --project=mobile-390 && playwright test tests/e2e/mobile-header.spec.ts --project=mobile-390 --grep "(ru|fr|de) header fits 390px" && playwright test tests/e2e/localization.spec.ts --project=mobile-390 --grep "LanguageSwitcher lists every language|booking dialog does not render"
scripts.test:e2e:mobile: playwright test tests/e2e/mobile-header.spec.ts tests/e2e/booking-flow.spec.ts tests/e2e/booking-footer.spec.ts tests/e2e/layout-overflow.spec.ts --project=mobile-390
